mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, A.* FROM ( SELECT C.COMPANY_NUMBER AS companyNumber, C.COMPANY_NAME AS companyName, C.COMPANY_ADDRESS AS companyAddress, C.COMPANY_STATE AS companyState, CI.COMP_SUMMARY AS compSummary, F.FILE_PATH AS filePath, TO_CHAR(CI.COMP_PAGE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS compPageDate, NVL(JP.CAT1_IS_HIRING, 0) AS cat1IsHiring, NVL(JP.CAT2_IS_HIRING, 0) AS cat2IsHiring, NVL(JP.CAT3_IS_HIRING, 0) AS cat3IsHiring, NVL(JP.CAT4_IS_HIRING, 0) AS cat4IsHiring FROM TBL_COMPANY C LEFT JOIN TBL_COMP_INFO CI ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = CI.COMPANY_NUMBER LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COMPANY_NUMBER, MIN(FILE_NUMBER) AS FILE_NUMBER FROM TBL_FILE GROUP BY COMPANY_NUMBER ) FM ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = FM.COMPANY_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_FILE F ON FM.FILE_NUMBER = F.FILE_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_JOB_POST JP ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = JP.COMPANY_NUMBER ORDER BY C.COMPANY_NUMBER DESC ) A ) WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT COUNT(CI.COMPANY_NUMBER) FROM TBL_COMPANY C JOIN TBL_COMP_INFO CI ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = CI.COMPANY_NUMBER
WHERE C.COMPANY_NAME LIKE '%' || #{_parameter} || '%'

SELECT C.COMPANY_NUMBER AS companyNumber, C.COMPANY_NAME AS companyName, C.COMPANY_ADDRESS AS companyAddress, C.COMPANY_STATE AS companyState, C.COMPANY_BRN AS companyBrn,
F.FILE_PATH AS filePath,
CI.COMP_CEO_NAME AS compCeoName, CI.COMP_FND_YEAR AS compFndYear, CI.COMP_EMPL_CNT AS compEmplCnt, CI.COMP_REV AS compRev, CI.COMP_CAP AS compCap, CI.COMP_TYPE AS compType, CI.COMP_SUMMARY AS compSummary, CI.COMP_TECH AS compTech, CI.COMP_MAIN_BIZ AS compMainBiz, CI.COMP_INFO AS compInfo, CI.COMP_SVC_HIST AS compSvcHist,
JP.JOB_POST_PROFILE AS jobPostProfile, JP.JOB_POST_CONTENT AS jobPostContent, JP.JOB_POST_PROCESS AS jobPostProcess, JP.JOB_POST_METHOD AS jobPostMethod, TO_CHAR(JP.JOB_POST_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS jobPostDate, NVL(JP.CAT1_IS_HIRING, 0) AS cat1IsHiring, NVL(JP.CAT2_IS_HIRING, 0) AS cat2IsHiring, NVL(JP.CAT3_IS_HIRING, 0) AS cat3IsHiring, NVL(JP.CAT4_IS_HIRING, 0) AS cat4IsHiring
FROM TBL_COMPANY C
LEFT JOIN TBL_COMP_INFO CI ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = CI.COMPANY_NUMBER
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COMPANY_NUMBER, MIN(FILE_NUMBER) AS FILE_NUMBER FROM TBL_FILE GROUP BY COMPANY_NUMBER ) FM ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = FM.COMPANY_NUMBER
LEFT JOIN TBL_FILE F ON FM.FILE_NUMBER = F.FILE_NUMBER
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT JP.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY JP.COMPANY_NUMBER ORDER BY JP.JOB_POST_DATE DESC, JP.JOB_POST_NUMBER DESC ) AS RN FROM TBL_JOB_POST JP ) WHERE RN = 1 ) JP ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = JP.COMPANY_NUMBER
WHERE C.COMPANY_NUMBER = #{value}
